blockedCapabilities.label: Native DWG export
blockedCapabilities.reason: No native DWG writer, round-trip compatibility, AutoCAD validation, or DWG fixture evidence exists.

blockedCapabilities.label: Production DXF export
blockedCapabilities.reason: Preview ASCII DXF footprint export exists. Production DXF with layers, dimensions, units, blocks, title sheets, and CAD QA evidence is not implemented.

blockedCapabilities.label: Payments
blockedCapabilities.reason: No payment processor credentials, checkout runtime, or transaction evidence exists.

blockedCapabilities.label: Live vendor network
blockedCapabilities.reason: Vendor records are seeded demo data; no live marketplace or vendor API is connected.

blockedCapabilities.label: Marketplace commerce
blockedCapabilities.reason: Marketplace pages are preview shells without live listing, order, fulfillment, or seller flows.

blockedCapabilities.label: Structural validation
blockedCapabilities.reason: Local preview checks exist, but no stamped load, wind, truss, rigging, anchoring, or temporary-structure safety certification exists.

blockedCapabilities.label: Electrical validation
blockedCapabilities.reason: Local preview checks exist, but no licensed load schedule, phase balancing, cabling, earthing, generator sizing, or certified electrical safety evidence exists.

blockedCapabilities.label: Fire safety validation
blockedCapabilities.reason: Local preview checks exist, but no certified fire exit, extinguisher, flame-retardant material, evacuation-width, or authority approval evidence exists.

blockedCapabilities.label: Engineering compliance
blockedCapabilities.reason: Local validators are not a municipal, engineering, accessibility, fire, electrical, or venue-authority compliance signoff.
